title: PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include: general medical exams, eye exams, alternative medicine, women's annual exam, STD screening and treatment, pediatric care, vaccinations, and mental health evaluations. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Email (503) 879-2002 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 879-2002 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Polk and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-5pm Services: Alternative Medicine General Medical Care Indian Health Service Clinics Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
